products.name: Data Science & AI
products.description: PRAVESHA™ AI Data Science & AI Program is a comprehensive 6-month training course covering the entire data science and artificial intelligence stack. Students learn Python programming, machine learning algorithms, deep learning with TensorFlow and PyTorch, data wrangling with Pandas and NumPy, data visualization with Matplotlib and Seaborn, SQL and NoSQL databases, NLP (Natural Language Processing), Computer Vision, and MLOps. The program includes real-world industry projects, a capstone project, and 1-on-1 mentorship with working data scientists. This course is suitable for freshers, IT professionals, engineers, and analysts who want to transition into AI/ML roles. Key selling points: 100% placement assistance, PRAVESHA™ AI certification recognized by 500+ companies, EMI facility available, batch options include Classroom (Mon–Sat), Online Live, and Hybrid mode. Fee ranges from ₹40,000 to ₹60,000 depending on mode chosen. The AI agent should highlight: job demand (Data Science is #1 fastest growing job), salary packages (₹6–25 LPA), no prior coding needed, free demo class available, and next batch starts soon.
products.target_audience: Fresh graduates, IT professionals, engineers, MCA/BCA/BSc students, working professionals looking to switch to AI/ML roles
products.prerequisites: Basic mathematics and logical thinking. No prior programming experience needed. 10+2 or graduation minimum.
products.certification: PRAVESHA™ AI Certified Data Science Professional — recognized by 500+ hiring companies
products.career_opportunities: Data Scientist, Machine Learning Engineer, AI Engineer, Data Analyst, Business Intelligence Developer, NLP Engineer, Computer Vision Engineer
questions: Are you looking to join our Data Science & AI course as a fresher or a working professional?
What specific goals or outcomes are you hoping to achieve through this training program?
How much time can you commit weekly for classes and practical assignments?
When are you planning to start your training session?

products.name: Full Stack Development
products.description: PRAVESHA™ Full Stack Development is an intensive 5-month Software Development Program covering both frontend and backend technologies used in the modern web industry. Students learn HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js with Redux and Hooks, Node.js, Express.js, REST APIs, GraphQL, MongoDB, MySQL, Git & GitHub version control, Docker basics, and AWS/Azure deployment. The program is structured as: Month 1–2 Frontend (HTML/CSS/JS/React), Month 3 Backend (Node.js/Express/APIs), Month 4 Databases & DevOps, Month 5 Final Project + Placement. Students build 5+ real-world projects including an e-commerce platform, social media app, and real-time chat application. This course is ideal for students, freshers, and professionals who want to become full-stack developers and get hired at top product companies or startups. Key selling points: Build production-ready apps, placement support with IT companies and startups, EMI available, batch options: Classroom, Online Live, Hybrid. Fee: ₹35,000 to ₹55,000 depending on mode. The AI agent should highlight: high demand for full-stack developers, salary range ₹4–20 LPA, zero to hero approach, free demo class, next batch starting soon.
key_features: HTML5, CSS3, Flexbox, Grid & Responsive Design
React.js with Redux, Hooks & Context API
products.target_audience: Students, freshers, and working professionals wanting to become full-stack developers or switch into software development
products.prerequisites: Basic computer knowledge and logical thinking. No prior coding experience required. 10+2 or graduation.
products.certification: PRAVESHA™ AI Certified Full Stack Developer — industry-recognized certificate
products.career_opportunities: Full Stack Developer, Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, React Developer, Node.js Developer, Software Engineer at startups and MNCs

products.name: Digital Marketing
products.description: PRAVESHA™ Digital Marketing Certification Program is a 3-month comprehensive Marketing Certification Program covering all aspects of modern digital marketing. The curriculum includes: SEO (Search Engine Optimization), SEM & Google Ads, Social Media Marketing (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube), Meta Ads (Facebook/Instagram advertising), Content Marketing & Copywriting, Email Marketing, WhatsApp Marketing, Google Analytics 4, Google Search Console, HubSpot CRM, Canva for design, and Influencer Marketing. Students run live ad campaigns with real budgets during the training. This course suits marketing professionals, business owners, freelancers, freshers, and anyone who wants to build a career in the booming digital marketing industry. Key selling points: learn to run ads with real ₹5,000 budget, get 5+ Google & Meta certifications, freelancing guidance included, placement support with agencies, EMI available. Fee: ₹20,000–₹30,000. The AI agent should highlight: digital marketing jobs growing 30% YoY, salary ₹3–15 LPA, freelance earning potential ₹50,000+/month, free demo class available, weekend batches for working professionals.
key_features: Google Ads — Search, Display, Shopping & YouTube Ads
Social Media Marketing — organic & paid strategies
Live campaign management with real budget
products.target_audience: Marketing professionals, business owners, entrepreneurs, freshers, freelancers, and anyone wanting to grow a brand or career in digital marketing
products.prerequisites: Basic internet and smartphone knowledge. No technical background needed. 10+2 minimum.
products.certification: PRAVESHA™ AI Certified Digital Marketer + Google Ads + Google Analytics + Meta Blueprint certifications
products.career_opportunities: Digital Marketing Manager, SEO Specialist, SEM/PPC Analyst, Social Media Manager, Content Marketer, Freelance Digital Marketer, Growth Hacker

products.name: AWS Cloud
products.description: PRAVESHA™ AWS Cloud Computing Program is an industry-ready 4-month Cloud Computing Program focused on Amazon Web Services — the world's #1 cloud platform used by 90% of Fortune 500 companies. The curriculum covers: AWS Core Services (EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS, Route53), Lambda & Serverless Architecture, CloudFormation & Terraform (Infrastructure as Code), DevOps on AWS (CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy), Docker & Kubernetes on ECS/EKS, Cloud Security & Compliance, Cost Optimization, Monitoring with CloudWatch, and full preparation for AWS certification exams. Students get hands-on lab access on AWS Free Tier. This course is ideal for IT professionals, developers, system administrators, and engineers looking to transition into high-paying cloud roles. Key selling points: AWS certs doubles your salary, cloud jobs pay ₹8–35 LPA, dedicated cert prep (CCP + SAA exams covered), placement support with IT companies. Fee: ₹35,000–₹50,000, EMI available.
key_features: AWS Core Services — EC2, S3, VPC, IAM, RDS, Route53
DevOps on AWS — CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy
AWS Certification prep — CCP & SAA exams
Hands-on labs on real AWS environment
products.target_audience: IT professionals, software developers, system administrators, network engineers, and freshers with basic IT knowledge looking to move to cloud roles
products.prerequisites: Basic IT knowledge or any programming experience recommended. Linux fundamentals helpful but not mandatory.
products.certification: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CCP) + AWS Solutions Architect Associate (SAA) prep + PRAVESHA™ AI Cloud Certificate
products.career_opportunities: Cloud Engineer, AWS Solutions Architect, DevOps Engineer, Cloud Consultant, Site Reliability Engineer, Cloud Security Engineer

products.name: Corporate Training
products.description: PRAVESHA™ Corporate Training offers Customized Corporate Learning programs for organizations looking to upskill their teams. We design and deliver bespoke training programs in technology, leadership, data literacy, digital transformation, cloud adoption, cybersecurity awareness, and domain-specific skills. Training can be delivered on-site at the client's office, virtually via Zoom/Teams, or as intensive bootcamp workshops. We conduct a pre-training skill gap analysis, design a custom curriculum, deliver training in batches, and provide post-training assessments and reports. Minimum batch size: 10 participants. Maximum: 100+ participants per cohort. Popular topics: Python for Business Teams, AI & ML Awareness, Cloud Adoption (AWS/Azure), Cybersecurity Basics, Data Analytics with Excel/Power BI, Digital Marketing for Sales Teams, Leadership & Soft Skills. Pricing is on request based on number of participants, duration, and topics selected. The AI agent should highlight: customized curriculum, minimum 10 people per batch, on-site/virtual delivery, certificate of completion for all participants, quick turnaround time for proposal — ask the lead for their team size and training topic.
key_features: Fully customized curriculum based on skill gap analysis
Pre & post training assessment with reports
Topics: Python, AI, Cloud, Cybersecurity, Digital Marketing, Data Analytics, Leadership
Certificate of completion for all participants
products.duration: Flexible — 1 Day to 3 Months (based on client requirements)
products.fee_range: On Request (pricing per batch / per participant — contact for quote)
products.target_audience: HR departments, L&D teams, IT companies, banks, manufacturing companies, government organizations, startups wanting to upskill their workforce
products.prerequisites: Defined by client requirements and the specific training topic chosen.
products.certification: PRAVESHA™ AI Corporate Training Certificate of Completion — issued to each participant

products.name: LMS Platform
products.description: PRAVESHA™ LMS (Learning Management System) Platform is a complete EdTech software solution for training institutes, colleges, and coaching centers to manage their entire online and offline education operations digitally. Key features include: Course creation and management, Student enrollment and portal, Live class scheduling (Zoom/Meet integration), Attendance tracking, Assignments and quiz management, Progress tracking and reports, Automated certificate generation, Faculty management, Fee collection and invoicing, Mobile app for students (Android & iOS), WhatsApp notifications, and Custom branding with your institute's logo and domain. Pricing: Monthly plan ₹5,000/month (up to 500 students), Annual plan ₹40,000/year (2 months free), Custom enterprise pricing for 1,000+ students. The AI agent should highlight: helps institutes go fully digital, saves admin time by 60%, students love the mobile app, white-label branding, quick 2-week setup, free demo available, and ask lead about their current student count and pain points.
key_features: Live class integration — Zoom & Google Meet
Custom branding — your logo, domain, colors

products.target_audience: Training institutes, coaching centers, colleges, EdTech companies, schools offering online or blended education

products.name: PRAVESHA™ AI CRM
products.description: PRAVESHA™ AI CRM is an AI-powered Lead Automation & CRM platform specifically built for training institutes and EdTech companies. It captures leads from all channels — Facebook Lead Ads, Instagram, Google Lead Forms, LinkedIn, website forms, WhatsApp click-to-chat, QR codes, walk-in registrations — and automates the entire admissions funnel from lead capture to enrollment. Core features: AI Lead Scoring (0–100 score), AI Calling Agent (auto-calls leads), WhatsApp drip campaigns, automated follow-up scheduling, counselor dashboard, admission pipeline (New → Contacted → Interested → Demo → Fee Discussion → Admitted), payment tracking, analytics dashboard with conversion reports, multi-branch support, and social media lead integration. Plans: Starter ₹8,000/month (500 leads), Growth ₹20,000/month (2,000 leads + AI calling), Enterprise ₹75,000/year (unlimited + dedicated support). The AI agent should highlight: saves 3 hours/day per counselor, increases admission conversion by 40%, AI automatically follows up with cold leads, integrates with Facebook/Instagram/Google in minutes, free trial available, and ask lead about their current lead volume per month and biggest challenge.
key_features: Multi-channel lead capture — Facebook, Instagram, Google, WhatsApp, Website, Walk-in
AI Lead Scoring — 0 to 100 score based on behaviour & profile
AI Calling Agent — auto-calls leads, asks questions, records interest
Admission pipeline — New → Contacted → Interested → Demo → Enrolled
Analytics — conversion reports, lead source ROI
Facebook, Instagram & Google Ads API integration
CRM mobile app for counselors on the go
products.target_audience: Training institutes, coaching centers, EdTech companies, universities with active lead generation wanting to automate admissions
products.prerequisites: None — cloud-based SaaS, works on any device, no IT team required. Setup done by PRAVESHA™ team within 2 weeks.
products.certification: Not applicable — this is a SaaS CRM platform
products.career_opportunities: Automates admissions, increases conversions, and reduces manual follow-up work for counselors
